programme.desc: Jim tries to convince Cheryl that it was her idea to turn the basement into a media room instead of a room for Gracie and Ruby, blaming her forgetfulness on pregnancy.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim uses Andy's gift certificate just before Andy remembers he has it and invites Jim to help him use it.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim institutes a tribunal system to stop the children from bickering, and it works well for solving the children's problems but backfires when he and Andy have an argument.

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Kevin and Sarah (Ron Eldard, Justine Bateman) disagree over replacing his bed.

programme.desc: Jamie's photo of a man committing suicide gets him in trouble with the police.

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Sarah shares quarters with the guys when her apartment is fumigated.

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Jamie falls in love with the guys' new housekeeper.

programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.desc: See why this cleaning tool replaces chemicals and hard labor!

programme.desc: We take a look at a few disastrous family photo shoots, some of the most outrageous grandparents and celebrate some healthy sibling rivalries.

programme.desc: Eric is thrilled when Donna sneaks over to his room for a sleepover; Hyde's new boss at the photo shop is a dope.

programme.desc: Jill wants Mark to see his first ballet, but Tim spoils her plans; Jill convinces Tim to leave Randy and Brad at home alone.

programme.desc: Tim receives the cold shoulder from both Jill and her visiting mother when he tries to mediate a dispute between them.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim gets into trouble with Jill when he bumps into his high-school girlfriend, who insists on meeting his wife.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: When a charismatic new pastor joins the congregation, Abishola takes a new interest in church; after Dottie gives out bonuses to upper management, but not Goodwin, Bob must do what he can to make sure he doesn't lose his best employee.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: After Cheryl's cooking class choice proves to be a disaster, Jim gets to pick paintball as the next couple's activity.

programme.title: According to Jim

programme.desc: Mike and Ryan vehemently disagree when a school counselor suggests that Boyd start ADHD medication; Mandy tries to get good grades.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Boyd's school considers a change after his research on its namesake causes outrage; Mandy relies on Blanca's expertise while working on a class project.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim's sister (Jennifer Coolidge) shows up on his doorstep -- pregnant.

programme.desc: Andy resents a wealthy client (Nana Visitor), then ends up dating her.

programme.desc: Tim and the "Tool Time" crew begin work on Tim's bathroom, motivated by overcrowding and Jill's ultimatum.

programme.desc: Tim tries to prove a point to Jill by hosting an all-female show to teach women how to do household repairs.

programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) agrees to clean the house for Jill (Patricia Richardson) while she works on a fund-raising speech.

programme.desc: Mike plans to get Ryan and Kyle adept at fixing things around the house by pitting them against each other; Eve's boyfriend tells her he loves her.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Eve surprises Mike and Vanessa with her decision about college; Kyle and Mandy decide to have Ed's recently deceased dog stuffed.

programme.desc: The winner of the "Meet Outdoor Man" contest thinks Mike's video log contains secret messages; Vanessa starts a lending library to meet people in her neighborhood; Chuck adjusts to his new life after his wife takes a job in Los Angeles.
